title.en: You can't ask the white-bearded old man directl...

content.en:
The White-bearded Old Man is a very mysterious pinnacle legendary realm, and being able to befriend multiple eternal masters is not easy in itself.

Therefore, any peak Legendary Realm lord would be extremely respectful to the white-bearded old man and would not offend him.

It's normal for the Lord of the Word to not know the strength of the old man with the white beard, because the old man with the white beard hasn't made a move for too long, who knows his true strength?

You can't ask the white-bearded old man directly, that's too rude~.

Ye Tian discussed with the Lord of the Dark Word for a long time, and then he ended the discussion.

"According to what the Lord of the Word said, my current strength should be between the first and second levels of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, slightly inferior to the Ice Lord. Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he had only broken through to the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord, and now it was slightly easier to comprehend other realms, and it was also slightly easier to create top-notch supreme techniques.

With his talent, his strength would soon be comparable to that of a second-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

In the following years, Ye Tian's main thing was to create top-notch supreme skills, because only by mastering enough top-notch supreme skills, there would be no shortcomings, and his strength would be strong.

And two top-notch supreme skills are definitely not enough.

In terms of attack, he has six fists, which is enough for the time being, and in terms of defense, he has the Gu Xia battle body, which is barely enough.

However, he didn't have the top supreme skill of speed.

"Next, let's focus on the top supreme skills of the speed class. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Ye Tian had mastered a variety of Dao before, among which he had mastered the Dao of Speed, so if he added time and space, it was enough to create a very good top-notch technique of speed

The speed class top supreme skill is not just fast, and it can break out of the shackles, otherwise no matter how fast the speed is, once it is imprisoned, it will not be able to move, then such a speed top supreme skill will be of no use.

Therefore, the real speed top supreme skill must be able to shuttle between the time level and the space level, and can penetrate all constraints, so that it can be called the top speed supreme skill.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian had tried countless times, and he had also consulted the battle traces of many eternal masters, and after contemplating again and again, he finally created a top speed supreme skill after spending thirty eternal eras

Time is long.

Ye Tian was here to test his speed class top supreme technique, he instantly turned into a ray of light, crossed the long river of time, and entered the empty sea, the speed was almost unimaginable.

And.

He let the other copy body of the right man use spatial restraint and various means, but it was difficult to stop the speed of this top supreme skill.

"This top-notch supreme skill is quite good, not only is it fast enough and difficult to be restrained, but it can also dodge the attacks of other peak Legendary Realm Lords. Ye Tian said darkly.

With such a speed class top supreme skill, his strength has been improved again.

"This top-notch supreme skill is called the Eternal Light!"

Ye Tian took the name.

After that, Ye Tian spent dozens of eternal epochs to create a top supreme technique of the bondage class, after all, without the top supreme skill of the bondage class, it is difficult to trap the enemy, then it is difficult to kill the enemy.

It's like a second-level peak Legendary Realm lord killing a weaker first-level peak Legendary Realm lord, if you can't kill the opponent with one blow, the opponent will flee directly, and it will be difficult to chase and kill.

Therefore, it is necessary to create a binding technique at the top to the highest skill level.

The top supreme technique of bondage created by Ye Tian was named the Eternal Prison by him, based on time, space, and the way of the five elements, forming a complete blockade of an area, like a prison.

In this way, Ye Tian currently has four top-notch supreme skills.

Eternal Prison, Eternal Light, Ancient Battlebody, Six Fists.

Coupled with the fact that he now has a Dacheng-level supreme legendary body, his own strength is probably not weaker than that of the second-level peak legendary realm lord who has just been promoted.

However, if Ye Tian wanted to greatly improve his cultivation, he had to fuse time and space.

He controls space and time, but he must control time and space at the same time, so that he can be regarded as stepping on the road of space-time fusion.

Space-time fusion may seem simple, but it is actually difficult because it is an essential fusion, not an ordinary level of fusion.

Once it is fused a little bit, the peak Legendary Realm Lord can control the power of time and space at the same time, even if it can only control a little bit, it can also exert a very powerful power.

For example, Ye Tian can now use the power of space or time at any time, even if he casts a top-notch attack supreme technique like the Six Dao Fist, mixed with the power of space and time, he can easily sense that it contains the power of time and space, and it is obvious that these two are just blended together, but not completely fused.

And after the real fusion, it is a new power, which can also be called the control of time and space.

Time and space control is the foundation of the time and space supreme technique, and Ye Tian has not yet practiced time and space fusion, so he does not have time and space control, so even if he is highly talented, he is currently unable to create a time and space supreme skill.

..............

However, the difficulty of space-time fusion is the beginning, for example, the Lord of the Stygian has not started the cultivation of space-time fusion, and the Lord of Wuheng is said to have not carried out space-time fusion.

It's not that they don't want to do space-time fusion, it's that they can't get started.

This entry stopped most of the peak Legendary Realm Lords.

For example, if the Lord of Impermanence crosses the timeline, goes back to the past, and comprehends the ancient desolate monuments of time and space again and again, he may be able to enter the fusion of time and space, and maybe after a period of time, he will still have the hope of becoming the lord of the second-level peak legendary realm

Unfortunately, he didn't have that opportunity.

It is precisely because of this that the Lord of Impermanence is so angry.

"It's a pity, I don't have the opportunity to comprehend the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space anymore now, last time I just went all out to comprehend the space. Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, there is more than just a treasure in the Void Region that can assist in the integration of time and space, and some top forces also have similar treasures, but those treasures will not be easily given to other peak Legendary Realm lords.

Ye Tian has a legendary-level time ancestor endowment, and he also has a legendary-level space ancestral endowment, and his talent far exceeds that of other peak Legendary Realm lords, so if he relies on himself, he can also fuse time and space to get started, but it will take a long time.

Thereupon.

He inquired about it to see where there were opportunities that could allow a peak Legendary Realm Lord like him to go to enlightenment, and after inquiring, the Void Region was really a place like this. _
